_comment: Issue 238: a captured plan.json whose tasks address every required capability with well-formed alignment evidence — reuse (target + usageEvidence), extend (target + patternRefs), add (patternRefs). Scores 1 with missing []. This is the same artifact shape validatePlannerArtifact accepts.

tasks.description: Persist the plan artifact and record its digest
ac: AC1: plan.json is written and hashed
tasks.tddApproach: Red: assert plan.json + hash, then persist.

alignment.reason: existing helper already writes artifactHashes[name]; no new writer needed
extend the frozen table lookup the same way the spine helper does

tasks.description: Fail closed when the role claim is absent
ac: AC2: a user with no role claim is denied
tasks.tddApproach: Red: assert denial for a claimless user, then guard.

alignment.reason: no existing guard for the absent-claim path; mirrors the clamp guard in cursor.mjs
